CVE-2015-8366.title: Array index error in smal_decode_segment function in LibRaw befor ...
CVE-2015-8366.description: Array index error in smal_decode_segment function in LibRaw before 0.17.1 allows context-dependent attackers to cause memory errors and possibly execute arbitrary code via vectors related to indexes.

CVE-2015-8367.title: The phase_one_correct function in Libraw before 0.17.1 allows att ...
CVE-2015-8367.description: The phase_one_correct function in Libraw before 0.17.1 allows attackers to cause memory errors and possibly execute arbitrary code, related to memory object initialization.

CVE-2017-13735.title: There is a floating point exception in the kodak_radc_load_raw fu ...
CVE-2017-13735.description: There is a floating point exception in the kodak_radc_load_raw function in dcraw_common.cpp in LibRaw 0.18.2. It will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-14265.title: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow was discovered in xtrans_interpolat ...
CVE-2017-14265.description: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow was discovered in xtrans_interpolate in internal/dcraw_common.cpp in LibRaw before 0.18.3. It could allow a remote denial of service or code execution attack.

CVE-2017-14348.title: LibRaw before 0.18.4 has a heap-based Buffer Overflow in the proc ...
CVE-2017-14348.description: LibRaw before 0.18.4 has a heap-based Buffer Overflow in the processCanonCameraInfo function via a crafted file.

CVE-2017-14608.title: In LibRaw through 0.18.4, an out of bounds read flaw related to k ...
CVE-2017-14608.description: In LibRaw through 0.18.4, an out of bounds read flaw related to kodak_65000_load_raw has been reported in dcraw/dcraw.c and internal/dcraw_common.cpp. An attacker could possibly exploit this flaw to disclose potentially sensitive memory or cause an application crash.

CVE-2017-16909.title: An error related to the "LibRaw::panasonic_load_raw()" function ( ...
CVE-2017-16909.description: An error related to the "LibRaw::panasonic_load_raw()" function (dcraw_common.cpp) in LibRaw versions prior to 0.18.6 can be exploited to cause a heap-based buffer overflow and subsequently cause a crash via a specially crafted TIFF image.

CVE-2017-16910.title: An error within the "LibRaw::xtrans_interpolate()" function (inte ...
CVE-2017-16910.description: An error within the "LibRaw::xtrans_interpolate()" function (internal/dcraw_common.cpp) in LibRaw versions prior to 0.18.6 can be exploited to cause an invalid read memory access and subsequently a Denial of Service condition.

CVE-2017-6886.title: An error within the "parse_tiff_ifd()" function (internal/dcraw_c ...
CVE-2017-6886.description: An error within the "parse_tiff_ifd()" function (internal/dcraw_common.cpp) in LibRaw versions before 0.18.2 can be exploited to corrupt memory.

CVE-2017-6887.title: A boundary error within the "parse_tiff_ifd()" function (internal ...
CVE-2017-6887.description: A boundary error within the "parse_tiff_ifd()" function (internal/dcraw_common.cpp) in LibRaw versions before 0.18.2 can be exploited to cause a memory corruption via e.g. a specially crafted KDC file with model set to "DSLR-A100" and containing multiple sequences of 0x100 and 0x14A TAGs.
